remarks.zh: 计算橱柜的板材尺寸。[宽度]、[高度]、[深度] 是总尺寸，[木板厚度] 是顶部、底部和侧板的材料厚度，[背景板厚度] 是背景板的材料厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] is total measurement, [BoardThick] is top, bottom, and side board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is background board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan bagi papan atas, bawah dan sisi, [BackBoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk lemari. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan atas, bawah, dan sisi, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดแผ่นไม้สำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height], [Depth] คือขนาดทั้งหมด, [BoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นด้านบน ล่าง และด้านข้าง, [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นด้านหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính toán kích thước ván cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là kích thước tổng thể, [BoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu ván trên, dưới và bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu ván nền. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang mga sukat ng panel para sa isang kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay kabuuang sukat, [BoardThick] ay kapal ng materyal ng itaas, ibaba, at gilid ng panel, [BackBoardThick] ay kapal ng materyal ng panel sa likod. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: ကင်ဘိနက်အဘို့ဘုတ်အရောများတွက်ချက်နည်း။ [Width၊Height][depth သော)စုစုပေါင်းအတိုင်းအတာများအားဖြင့်၊ [BoardThickလဒ်ပလောင့်]အပေါ်သည်ကြေးမုံ ဖုံးသည်ပြီး [BackBoardThტკ သခံနိုးတဲ့ တွင် ထုံရာစုစု (AI translatedmlease assembled )
